title: SR 19-8: SR 19-8 Questions on the Current Expected Credit Losses Methodology (CECL)
title_normalized: SR 19-8 Questions on the Current Expected Credit Losses Methodology (CECL)
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Supervision and Regulation > SR Letters > SR 19-8
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
applicability_raw: This guidance applies to all Federal Reserve supervised financial institutions,1 including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets, that file regulatory reports prepared in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP).2
section_headings: TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK
5.  See SR letter 16-12, "Interagency Guidance on the New Accounting Standard on Financial Instruments – Credit Losses." Return to text
bm25_text: SR 19-8 SR 19-8 Questions on the Current Expected Credit Losses Methodology (CECL) This guidance applies to all Federal Reserve supervised financial institutions,1 including those with $10 billion or less in consolidated assets, that file regulatory reports prepared in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles (GAAP).2 BOARD OF GOVERNORS OF THE FEDERAL RESERVE SYSTEM WASHINGTON, D.C. 20551 DIVISION OF SUPERVISION AND REGULATION TO THE OFFICER IN CHARGE OF SUPERVISION AT EACH FEDERAL RESERVE BANK SUBJECT: 3.  See https://www.federalreserve.gov/bankinforeg/topics/accounting.htm Return to text 5.  See SR letter 16-12, "Interagency Guidance on the New Accounting Standard on Financial Instruments – Credit Losses." Return to text 7.  See http://www.federalreserve.gov/apps/contactus/feedback.aspx.
